title: Attack the Chain Base
subtitle: Strike the root of the pawn chain
summary: White has built a pawn chain with its base on d4. Play as Black and undermine the base before White gets rolling.

body.goal: Attack the base of White's pawn chain, open lines for your pieces, and play on against the engine.
body.successHint: A pawn chain is weakest at its base — hit d4 with ...c5 rather than chipping at the head on e5.
